entities.name: SOIL CRUSTING
entities.description: The formation of a hard layer on the soil surface that can hinder crop growth.

entities.name: SOIL AND CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental factors that influence the occurrence of soil crusting.

entities.name: SEEDLING EMERGENCE
entities.description: The process of a seedling breaking through the soil surface to reach the air.

entities.name: INFILTRATION RATE
entities.description: The speed at which water enters the soil from the surface.

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: The liquid resource necessary for plant growth, which can be lost due to reduced infiltration.

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area.

entities.name: CRUST FORMATION
entities.description: The physical and chemical process leading to the creation of a soil crust.

entities.name: SOIL CRUST STRENGTH
entities.description: The measure of the physical resistance of the soil crust.

entities.name: IMPEDANCE TO SEEDLING EMERGENCE
entities.description: The physical barrier or resistance provided by the soil crust that prevents seedlings from emerging.
